allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output "killed node")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('src/data/brands.js','utf8'\); const m=s.match\(/data:image[^'\\"\)]+/g\)||[]; console.log\('base64 logos:', m.length\); m.forEach\(\(x,i\)=>console.log\(i, x.length, 'chars'\)\); console.log\('total file chars:', s.length\);")
